questions.question: What type of content do you need?
questions.description: Select the main communication channel or format for your message (e.g., email, push notification, SMS, or other).

Email.question: Is this email transactional or marketing?
value: Transactional Email (e.g., order confirmation, cancellation, OTP, etc.)
Email.description: Specify whether the email is for a transaction (like confirmations or OTPs) or for marketing/newsletter purposes.

Transactional Email (e.g., order confirm.question: What is the main objective of this transactional email?
Transactional Email (e.g., order confirm.description: Describe the primary purpose of this transactional email (e.g., booking confirmation, payment reminder, etc.).

Marketing Email / Newsletter.question: What is the main objective of this marketing email?
Marketing Email / Newsletter.description: Describe the main goal of this marketing email or newsletter (e.g., promotion, brand news, travel tips, etc.).

Email.question: Select the structure for your email:
value: Include Subject Line, Preview Text, Greeting, Detailed Body, CTA Button, and Footer
Email.description: Choose the layout and elements to include in your email (e.g., subject, greeting, body, CTA, footer).

Email.question: What layout do you prefer for your email?
Email.description: Select the preferred layout for your email, such as single-column or two-column format.

Push Notification.question: What is the main objective of this push notification?
value: Alert about order status or updates
Push Notification.description: State the main reason for sending this push notification (e.g., alert, promotion, update, etc.).

Push Notification.question: Select the structure for your push notification:
value: Include Title (optional), Message (up to 100 characters), CTA Button/Tag (optional)
Push Notification.description: Choose the elements to include in your push notification (e.g., title, message, CTA).

SMS (Text message).question: What is the main objective of this SMS?
value: Notify order status or send OTP/payment link
SMS (Text message).description: Describe the main purpose of this SMS (e.g., notify status, send OTP, announce promotion, etc.).

SMS (Text message).question: Select the structure for your SMS:
SMS (Text message).description: Choose the format for your SMS, such as a single concise message.

Other.question: Please specify the structure for your content:
Other.description: Provide details about the structure or format you want for your custom content type.

questions.question: Who is the intended recipient?
questions.description: Indicate who will receive or read this content (e.g., customers, clients, investors, media, etc.).

questions.question: Additional context or instructions for the model: (If any)
questions.description: Add any extra information or special instructions to help generate the content as you need.

questions.question: Would you like to attach a supporting document? (If any)
questions.description: Upload any relevant files that should be considered when generating the content.
